site.name: MOVE
site.metaDescription: For your assignments, relocations and mobility needs. No booking fees — book your all-inclusive furnished monthly rental directly, professional management included.
home.hero.title: MOVE, the monthly rental platform
home.hero.subtitle: For your assignments, relocations and mobility needs. No booking fees — book your all-inclusive furnished home directly, professional management included.
home.why.title: Why choose MOVE?
home.why.tenants.title: For tenants
home.why.tenants.body: Furnished, all-inclusive homes (utilities, water, electricity, internet), available from one month. No booking fees, with a contract adapted to your situation.
home.why.owners.title: For property owners
home.why.owners.body: Entrust your property to professional management: vetted tenants — companies and individuals on assignment, relocation or mobility — inventory reports, full stay follow-up.
footer.byline: Move, a service operated by France Room
search.title: Our homes
search.none: No homes match these criteria at the moment.
listing.moderated: Your request is reviewed by our team before confirmation.
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The requested page does not exist or is no longer available.
owners.title: Entrust your property to Move
owners.subtitle: Professional end-to-end management: vetted tenants, inventory reports, cleaning, full follow-up. You collect your rent, we handle the rest.
owners.step1.title: Apply
owners.step1.body: Introduce your property via the form below. Our team gets back to you quickly with an estimate.
owners.step2.title: Sign the mandate
owners.step2.body: Management mandate signed online. We prepare your listing: photos, pricing, calendar.
owners.step3.title: Rent with peace of mind
owners.step3.body: Vetted tenants — companies and individuals on assignment, relocation or mobility. Full stay management.
owners.form.title: Tell us about your property
owners.form.name: Full name
owners.form.note: Your information is only used to contact you about your property.
owners.form.sent: Thank you! Your application has been sent — our team will get back to you shortly.
owners.form.error: Please provide at least your name and a valid email.
about.title: About
about.p1: Renting a furnished home for a month or more should not be complicated. Move offers studios, apartments, houses and rooms, all inclusive (utilities, water, electricity, internet), available from one month — with no booking fees.
about.forWho.title: For your assignments, relocations and mobility needs
about.forWho.body: Employees on assignment, companies housing their teams, individuals in transition: every stay is covered by a contract adapted to your situation.
about.mgmt.title: Professional management, from first contact to the end of the stay
about.mgmt.body: Behind Move is France Room, a property management agency based in Paris and Marseille. Vetted homes, inventory reports, a contact person available throughout your stay.
legal.pending: Content being finalised — it will be published after validation.
signup.badName: Please provide your first and last name.
signup.exists: An account already exists with this email — please log in.
request.title: Request to book
request.reserveFor.entreprise: My company or my employer (company billing)
request.reserveFor.usage_personnel: Myself, for a temporary stay (work or personal) — not my main residence
request.reserveFor.residence_principale: Myself — this home will be my main residence
request.messagePh: Context of your stay: assignment, relocation, etc.
request.note: No payment at this step. Our team reviews your request, then you pay the first month to confirm.
request.badReserveFor: Please tell us who you are booking for.
request.notFree: These dates are no longer available — check the listing calendar.
account.title: My account
account.flash.sent: Your request has been sent — our team will get back to you shortly.
account.flash.paid: Payment confirmed — your booking is validated!
account.flash.cancelled: Payment cancelled — you can try again.
mail.requestSent.subject: Move — your request has been sent
mail.requestSent.body: We have received your request for '{title}' (arrival on {start}). Our team will get back to you shortly.
account.deposit.paid: Security deposit received — automatically refunded within 48h after your departure.
account.deposit.issue: Security deposit: being processed — our team will contact you.
